extendInfo.NSRemovableVolumesUsageDescription: Tome needs access to your connected reader to send, manage, and organise books on the device.
extendInfo.NSDesktopFolderUsageDescription: Tome needs access to read ebook files from your Desktop.
extendInfo.NSDocumentsFolderUsageDescription: Tome needs access to read ebook files from your Documents folder.
extendInfo.NSDownloadsFolderUsageDescription: Tome needs access to read ebook files from your Downloads folder.
